body_excerpt: In LPP_ConvertGNSS_DataBitAssistance of LPP_CommonUtil.c, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In LPP_ConvertGNSS_DataBitAssistance of LPP_CommonUtil.c, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional exec
